r\"https?://t\\.me/(liushanmen|lsmcdlxbot)(?![a-zA-Z0-9_])\",\n    re.IGNORECASE,\n)\n\n\ndef _rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links(s: str) -> str:\n    if not s:\n        return s\n    replace_map = {\n        \"liushanmen\": \"yixiancha\",\n        \"lsmcdlxbot\": \"yixiancha2\",\n    }\n\n    def _replace(match: re.Match) -> str:\n        matched_name = match.group(1).lower()\n        target_name = replace_map.get(matched_name, matched_name)\n        return f\"https://t.me/{target_name}\"\n\n    return _B_BOT_TME_RE.sub(_replace, s)\n\n\ndef _convert_inline_keyboard(markup: ReplyInlineMarkup) -> Optional[InlineKeyboardMarkup]:\n    tg_rows: List[List[InlineKeyboardButton]] = []\n    for row in markup.rows:\n        tg_buttons: List[InlineKeyboardButton] = []\n        for btn in row.buttons:\n            if isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonUrl):\n                url = _rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links(btn.url) if btn.url else btn.url\n                tg_buttons.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, url=url))\n            elif isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonCallback):\n                data = btn.data.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")[:64]\n                tg_buttons.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, callback_data=data))\n            elif isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonSwitchInline):\n                tg_buttons.append(\n                    InlineKeyboardButton(\n                        text=btn.text,\n                        switch_inline_query=btn.query,\n                    )\n                )\n            else:\n                tg_buttons.append(\n                    InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, callback_data=btn.text[:64])\n                )\n        if tg_buttons:\n            tg_rows.append(tg_buttons)\n    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(tg_rows) if tg_rows else None\n\n\nCAPTION_LIMIT = 1024\nTEXT_LIMIT = 4096\n\n\nasync def _send_one_message(chat_id: int, message: TelethonMessage) -> None:\n    if _app is None:\n        return\n\n    reply_markup: Optional[InlineKeyboardMarkup] = None\n    if isinstance(message.reply_markup, ReplyInlineMarkup):\n        reply_markup = _convert_inline_keyboard(message.reply_markup)\n\n    full_text = _rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links(message.text or message.raw_text or \"\")\n\n    if message.photo:\n        photo_bytes = await message.download_media(bytes)\n        if len(full_text) <= CAPTION_LIMIT:\n            await _app.bot.send_photo(\n                chat_id=chat_id,\n                photo=photo_bytes,\n                caption=full_text,\n                reply_markup=reply_markup,\n            )\n        else:\n            await _app.bot.send_photo(chat_id=chat_id, photo=photo_bytes)\n            await message.download_media(bytes)\n        caption = full_text[:CAPTION_LIMIT] if full_text else \"\"\n        await _app.bot.send_animation(\n            chat_id=chat_id,\n            animation=anim_bytes,\n            caption=caption,\n            reply_markup=reply_markup,\n        )\n        if len(full_text) > CAPTION_LIMIT:\n            await _send_long_text(chat_id, {
  "contents": "\"\"\"\nA Bot 模块：用户面向的 Telegram 机器人\n功能- 展示 8 个固定键盘按钮（ReplyKeyboardMarkup- 6 个命令菜单（/start /invite /sign /help /lm /bq- 本地拦截：个人信息、查询提示、充值、签到、邀请（走本SQLite- 积分检验与扣除：搜索文本lmbq 转发前先扣本地积- 其余消息转发userbot B bot 处理\n\"\"\"\n\nimport base64\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport re\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import List, Optional\n\nfrom telegram import (\n    BotCommand,\n    InlineKeyboardButton,\n    InlineKeyboardMarkup,\n    KeyboardButton,\n    ReplyKeyboardMarkup,\n    Update,\n)\nfrom telegram.constants import ParseMode\nfrom telegram.error import TelegramError\nfrom telegram.ext import (\n    Application,\n    ApplicationHandlerStop,\n    CallbackQueryHandler,\n    CommandHandler,\n    ContextTypes,\n    MessageHandler,\n    TypeHandler,\n    filters,\n)\nfrom telegram.request import HTTPXRequest\nfrom telethon.tl.types import (\n    Message as TelethonMessage,\n    ReplyInlineMarkup,\n    KeyboardButtonCallback,\n    KeyboardButtonUrl,\n    KeyboardButtonSwitchInline,\n)\n\nfrom config import BOT_TOKEN, ADMIN_IDS, customer_service_contact_url, get_httpx_proxy_url\nfrom database import (\n    check_user,\n    get_user,\n    sign_in,\n    charge_for_query,\n    is_vip,\n    add_points,\n    set_vip,\n)\nfrom userbot import UserbotManager\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n# ── 入群验证配置 ────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n_VERIFY_CHANNEL_ID = \"@yixiancha\"\n_VERIFY_GROUP_ID   = \"@yixiamcha\"\n_VERIFY_CHANNEL_URL = \"https://t.me/yixiancha\"\n_VERIFY_GROUP_URL   = \"https://t.me/yixiamcha\"\n_VERIFY_IMG = Path(__file__).parent / \"img\" / \"verify.jpg\"\n\n_VERIFY_TEXT = (\n    \"🔐 人机验证\\n\\n\"\n    \"请先加入以下频道/群组完成验证\\n\"\n    \"👇 点击下方按键即可一键加入 👇\\n\"\n    \"• 易先查频道\\n\"\n    \"• 易先查查询群组\\n\"\n)\n\n\nasync def _is_member(bot, user_id: int, chat_id: str) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    检查用户是否已加入指定频道/群组。\n\n    注意：\n    - getChatMember 仅在 bot 为该频道/群组管理员时才能可靠查询所有成员。\n    - \"restricted\" 表示被限制发言但仍在群里，同样视为已入群。\n    - 任何异常（含网络超时）均返回 True，避免误封。\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        member = await bot.get_chat_member(chat_id=chat_id, user_id=user_id)\n        return member.status in (\"member\", \"administrator\", \"creator\", \"restricted\")\n    except Exception:\n        return True\n\n\n# 绕过入群验证的命令前缀（直接走积分逻辑）\n_BYPASS_MEMBERSHIP_PREFIXES = (\"/lm\", \"/bq\", \"/cx\")\n\n\ndef _extract_message_command(text: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    提取消息中的命令前缀并归一化为 /cmd 形式。\n    兼容群组里的 /cmd@botname 参数 写法。\n    \"\"\"\n    if not text:\n        return \"\"\n    first_token = text.strip().split(maxsplit=1)[0]\n    if not first_token.startswith(\"/\"):\n        return \"\"\n    return first_token.split(\"@\", 1)[0].lower()\n\n\nasync def check_membership(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE) -> None:\n    \"\"\"\n    group=-1 全局拦截：所有消息/命令到达前先验证是否已入群。\n    未入群则发送验证图文并终止后续处理。\n    /lm、/bq、/cx 命令绕过入群验证，直接走积分检查。\n    无论是否通过验证，均先确保用户已入库并同步最新用户名。\n    \"\"\"\n    user = update.effective_user\n    chat = update.effective_chat\n    if user is None or chat is None:\n        return\n\n    # 每次进入都先同步用户信息（即使最终被拦截也能记录用户名和显示名）\n    check_user(\n        user.id,",
  "totalLinesInFile": 985
}

   if not s:\n        return s\n    replace_map = {\n        \"liushanmen\": \"yixiancha\",\n        \"lsmcdlxbot\": \"yixiancha2\",\n    }\n\n    def _replace(match: re.Match) -> str:\n s)\n\n\ndef _convert_inline_keyboard(markup: ReplyInlineMarkup) -> Optional[InlineKeyboardMarkup]:\n    tg_rows: List[List[InlineKeyboardButton]] = []\n    for row in markup.rows:\n        tg_buttons: List[InlineKeyboardButton] = []\n        for btn in row.buttons:\n            button_text = (btn.text or \"\").strip()\n            if any(keyword in button_text for keyword in _B_BOT_BLOCKED_BUTTON_KEYWORDS):\n                continue\n            if isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonUrl):\n                url = _rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links(btn.url) if btn.url else btn.url\n                tg_buttons.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, url=url))\n            elif isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonCallback):\n                data = btn.data.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")[:64]\n                tg_buttons.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, callback_data=data))\n            elif isinstance(btn, KeyboardButtonSwitchInline):\n                tg_buttons.append(\n                    InlineKeyboardButton(\n                        text=btn.text,\n                        switch_inline_query=btn.query,\n                    )\n                )\n            else:\n                tg_buttons.append(\n                    InlineKeyboardButton(text=btn.text, callback_data=btn.text[:64])\n                )\n        if tg_buttons:\n            tg_rows.append(tg_buttons)\n    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(tg_rows) if tg_rows else None\n\n\nCAPTION_LIMIT = 1024\nTEXT_LIMIT = 4096\n\n\nasync def _send_one_message(chat_id: int, message: TelethonMessage) -> None:\n    if _app is None:\n        return\n\n    reply_markup: Optional[InlineKeyboardMarkup] = None\n    if isinstance(message.reply_markup, ReplyInlineMarkup):\n        reply_markup = _convert_inline_keyboard(message.reply_markup)\n\n    full_text = _rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links(message.text or message.raw_text or \"\")\n\n    if message.photo:\n        photo_bytes = await message.download_media(bytes)\n        if len(full_text) <= CAPTION_LIMIT:\n            await _app.bot.send_photo(\n                chat_id=chat_id,\n                photo=photo_bytes,\n                caption=full_text,\n                reply_markup=reply_markup,\n            )",

}

## 🤖 Assistant #17 (Agent)

_2026-04-23 10:13:17Z_

已实现。

现在 `b bot` 返回内容里只要包含这两个链接，都会被替换成 `https://t.me/yixiancha`：

- `https://t.me/liushanmencd/322`
- `https://telegra.ph/liushanmen-10-01`

改动位置在 `bot.py` 的 `_rewrite_b_bot_outgoing_links()`，所以会同时作用于：

- 普通消息文本里的链接
- 内联按钮 URL 里的链接

并且已检查，当前没有新增 linter 报错。
